counters.description: my go-to perma ban as she is faster than you, is ap so nukes you, and will just put you to sleep while you die a painful death.
his flay cancels your q, has a lot of abilities to counter yours.
one click of a button and he stops you dead in your tracks, his ult melts you. really unfun to play against.
this matchup is actually hard to stand against. under absolutely no circumstances, never (!) allow this guy to get 5 stacks of his passive on you if you still want to win this matchup.

fiora has kinda weak early game: it's when you have an advantage. her riposte (w) is baitable with your q. to bait her riposte, you can also just wait for her to use it before you engage with your taunt. fight her only with active w and taunt her only when you are sure it's good for you: some fiora players will just dash to you with a riposte, thinking that you will taunt her. early game and mid game are yours, but late game is hers because of her ultimate who deal a lot of true damages.
graves is hard to kill, especially mid late game. use your chance early on to get ahead and keep the lead if you can !
without a lot of stacks, kindred is at a disadvantage. otherwise, she'll deal a ton of damage to you and will always outtrade you. so, deny her to stack and you'll win.

: kled is good against tanks because of his passive: he aborts your taunt by mounting and dismounting and his attacks also bring him closer to mount. trade with thornmail: if he is mounted, trade when his w is up. if he is dismounted, trade whenever he spends his w.

master yi is an auto attack reliant champion with a lot of attack speed. early on, he'll die really fast, but if he'll snowball early on, he'll be a real threat which will escalate even more in late game, where you will lose every duel with him because his wuju style deals true damage. (rammus' one true counter is true dmg)

olaf deals true damage and negates all crowd control with his ultimate. this means that your q and e will be useless against him during his ultimate. stacking health against him helps to survive, stacking armor helps to kill him faster (yet he can still kill you because of his true damage - trade on your own risk).

be very careful early game to not snowball her. you can cancel her third q dash with your q. she has 4 dashes in total which makes her extremely mobile so she is hard to kill. if you will rush thornmail though, you can kill her faster and burst her better. if she is under 30% of her health and you are over 70% of your health, dive her with laner.

be careful early game: he can use q to disarm you. aim for an early thornmail. trundle counters rammus pretty well with his subjugate (r). when he uses it, just flee as fast as you can. when it is over, engage him with your r and kill him.
tryndamere has a lot of lifesteal and healing

tank udyr is annoying against rammus because he can stun you with his (e) and run away, has a shield from (w) which tanks your damage. he isn't really strong in teamfights, so taunt him, turn your w on and watch him dying. preferrably do so when he enables his (q).

hard matchup early on. try to get your level 6 before she will get hers or wait before you get thornmail so you can dive her with it if you are full health. don't let her to harass you for free: always trade back. be aware of her late game too since she will deal obnoxious damage.
very annoying as your ganking is linear and she can just put you to sleep and burst you because she reduces your mr, unfun to play into this champ

synergies.description: great at keeping rammus alive allowing him to front line and tank
same as soraka but has been nerfed a decent amount, raka > yuumi
movespeed from his e feels great
speed from her r allows easy engages
great at keeping rammus alive allowing him to front line and tank
same as soraka but has been nerfed a decent amount, raka > yuumi
movespeed from his e feels great
speed from her r allows easy engages
